title: Medical Records Organizer
desc: Each patient has a QR storing prescriptions, lab reports, scans — no more lost papers or files. Instant access in any hospital, anytime.

title: Appliance Warranty & Repair Logs
desc: Track fridge, AC, washing machine repairs, warranties, part replacements — easily retrievable when you need them most.

title: Educational Certificates Holder
desc: Students can link degrees, awards, training certifications under one smart QR identity — shareable with employers instantly.

title: House Ownership & Repair History
desc: Blueprints, approvals, maintenance history — attach everything securely to your home's QR. Perfect for resale documentation.

title: Vehicle History Recorder
desc: Cars, bikes, trucks — QR holds purchase, insurance, servicing, and resale trust details. Builds buyer confidence instantly.

title: Plant & Tree Tagging
desc: Track species, planting date, fertilizer routine, care logs for farms, gardens, and botanic parks. Scan to know the full story of a plant.

title: Journey of a Little Plant in a Pot
desc: Expand the boundary of visibility of a plant in a pot and beyond. A living story told through a QR code.

title: Artworks & Antiques Provenance
desc: Boost trust by storing ownership transfer, exhibition history, and restoration info under QR tags. Authentic, tamper-evident records.

title: Rental Equipment Tracking
desc: Manage rental history, damage reports, and condition records of cameras, tools, bikes — all accessible via a single QR scan.

title: Event Management
desc: QRs at events for navigation, stall details, security protocols, visitor feedback links. Update info in real-time without reprinting.

title: Lost & Found Recovery
desc: Attach QR to bags, gadgets, pets — making owner info recoverable without exposing private contact details. Finder-friendly by design.

title: Supply Chain Authenticity
desc: Prove origin, transfers, and repairs across manufacturer, retailer, and service chain. Build consumer trust with transparent provenance.

title: Community Sharing Items
desc: QRs for lending libraries, shared tools, community gardens with lending and usage history. Track who has what and when it's due back.

title: Memory Vault for Heirlooms
desc: Attach emotional stories, photos, and timelines to family jewels, watches, vintage items. Preserve the story behind every treasure.

title: Memento – Memory-Linked Artifacts
desc: A birthday gift, a school trophy, a souvenir from a distant land. Every memento holds a moment — now preserved forever via QR.

title: Construction Equipment Tracking
desc: Track cranes, excavators, mixers with rental history, damage notes, and safety inspection records via QR. Compliant documentation made easy.

title: Farm Produce Traceability
desc: Link mango crates, wheat bags to farm origin, harvest dates, pesticide-free certifications. Farm-to-fork transparency at scale.

title: Digital Business Cards
desc: Professionals attach QR to visiting cards linking to resumes, portfolios, and LinkedIn profiles. Never run out of business cards again.

title: Authenticity Trail (Handcrafted Fashion)
desc: Garments featuring regional embroidery, each with a QRTagAll code verifying its journey — with photos, geo-tags, and timestamps from artisan to customer.
